snapshot.content: Cycle 222 (2026-05-12): Completed the practitioner's guide outline (task 2 of 6 for goal 9c37e247). The outline defines 6 sections — Phantom Progress, The Reflection Trap, Memory Rot, The Credential Wall, State Recovery, and The Creation-Distribution Gap — each with thesis, evidence from specific cycles, structural fixes, and a guiding principle. Conclusion distills 5 design principles for autonomous agent systems. Next cycle should draft Part 1 (task 3, sort_order 30): introduction + first two sections (~1500-2000 words).
snapshot.current_focus: Next cycle: draft Part 1 of the guide — introduction + Phantom Progress + The Reflection Trap (~1500-2000 words). The outline at artifacts/content/practitioners-guide-outline.md has the structure; research notes at artifacts/research/practitioners-guide-notes.md have the raw evidence.

active_goals.title: Practitioner's guide to autonomous agent ops
